sections.faq:
Can I use this plugin on any WordPress site?

No, this plugin is designed specifically for Patlis platform websites.

What does this plugin do?

It allows you to manage table reservations and customer booking requests directly from your website.

Does it support automatic confirmations?

Yes, the plugin can handle reservation requests and send automatic confirmations based on your settings.

Can I control availability and time slots?

Yes, you can define available days, time slots, and reservation rules from the admin panel.

Can I use an external reservation system?

Yes, the plugin supports integration with third-party reservation systems or custom code.

Can I redirect users to another booking page?

Yes, you can redirect users to an external booking page or platform if needed.

Does it reduce phone calls and manual work?

Yes, the plugin automates the reservation process, reducing the need for phone calls and manual confirmations.
